title: Planner
goal: Implement planner(request, logs) -> PlanningResponse: DAG validation, topological order, fixed-duration scheduling into the 4h window, affect integration, semi-legitimization, candidate ranking, internal explanations, diagnostics.
implementation_notes: May import schema and affect only.
PURE: no file I/O, no env vars, no GitHub, no mutation of request.
Derive effective task set from request + logs: filter completed, flag blocked, ignore skipped.
Auto-select top (or first-equal) candidate as default Plan.
Generate explanations internally; do NOT create an explanations module.
Set probability_quality = not_estimated; leave coverage fields null.
Reject dependency cycles with a clear diagnostic.
